statement: In every magma, Equation 1612 (`x = (y * z) * (w * (y * u))`) implies Equation 3875 (`x * x = (x * (y * z)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0629
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y z) (op w (op y u)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x x) = (op (op x (op y z)) z)
